Video.summary: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 2)

Video.summary: A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.
Video.title: Pig vs. Pug

Video.summary: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.
Video.title: Wild Things

Video.summary: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.
Video.title: Devil Dog

Video.summary: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.
Video.title: Naughty Rotties

Video.summary: A family deals with a stray dog who bites; Daisy Fuentes has trouble controlling her English bulldog.
Video.title: Boyfriend and Alfie

Video.summary: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.
Video.title: Doggie Jekyll & Hyde

Video.summary: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.
Video.title: Lives Changed

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.
Video.title: Beagle Mania

Video.summary: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.
Video.title: Triple Dog Trouble

Video.summary: Cesar has his hands full with a Labrador that is obsessed with water and a Chihuahua with a penchant for biting legs.
Video.title: Raging Bandit

Video.summary: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.
Video.title: Expecting Trouble

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.
Video.title: Lawnmower Love

Video.summary: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German Shepherd who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.
Video.title: Spike in the Heart

Video.summary: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.
Video.title: Shell-Shocked

Video.summary: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.
Video.title: Spoiled Rotten

Video.summary: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.
Video.title: The Evil Queen

Video.summary: A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.
Video.title: Daisy and Sophie

Video.summary: Cesar helps Lucy, an odd Dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.
Video.title: Lucy and Lizzie

Video.summary: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.
Video.title: Boogie-Boarding Beagle

Video.summary: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.
Video.title: Scared Straight

Video.summary: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 1)

Video.summary: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.
Video.title: Holy Terror

Video.summary: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.
Video.title: LA Laker Meltdown

Video.summary: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.
Video.title: Big Biters

Video.summary: A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.
Video.title: Buddy and Stewart
